scripts.studio: bun run assets && remotion studio src/index.ts
scripts.still: bun run assets && remotion still src/index.ts IngitPromo out/ingit-promo-preview.png --frame=390
scripts.render: bun run assets && remotion render src/index.ts IngitPromo out/ingit-promo-vertical.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=17 --pixel-format=yuv420p --audio-codec=aac
